Secretary Wilson of the agricultural department is fur
nishing material for a debate


Mr. Wilson, in accordance with his purpose to smu
late the home production of everything that be grown
upon our soil, is experimenting with the new poppy
plant.


This plant whose native home is in China and India
grows to some extent in this country but not luxurianty
ut furnishes the article of known opium and
its preparations The secretary of agriculture is trying
bring the plant to perfection and says if all goes we'll we
shall be growing opium.


Whereat the issue.


The secretary has encountered the opposition of the
Womens Christian Temperance Union, which claims that
the production of opium in America menaces the public
health and morals. These good women point to the
ages of the opium habit among the Chinese, Hindus and
ing growth of the of the various forms of the drug in
this country They contend that the opium trade should
he hedged about by heavy restrictions and that the price
of the article should not be lowered contemplated by
large home production.


Here is nice ethical issue


On the hand the secretary may point the fact
that while opium is notorious msused it has great mis-
sion 1t is leading remedy of maeria medica. 1t allays
pain that else would rack and torture the human to
distraction Used universally by physicians it produces
specific beneficial results and in many is ndespens
able


On the other hand the temperance workers say the pres
ent production of the plant is than adequate for med
zeal purposes They claim that larger production and
lower prices will lead to excessive of the drug and all
\ the attendant evils entaied by such use.
